easy.title: Number Classification
easy.description: Write a function that returns "positive", "negative", or "zero".
hints: What three relationships can a number have with zero?

medium.title: Leap Year Detector
medium.description: Return true if a year is a leap year (divisible by 4, except centuries not divisible by 400).
hints: Check the most restrictive rule first (400)

hard.title: Date Validator
hard.description: Validate a date (day, month, year) — check month range, days per month, and leap year February.
hints: Store days per month in an array
Validate month and year before day

debugging.title: Debug the Conditions
debugging.description: The following typescript code has bugs. Find and fix them.
bugs: Assignment (=) instead of comparison (==) — always true
Missing elif — both conditions can apply, giving double discount
